description_long: This is a modern two-story cafe named 'COFFEE LOUNGE' with a prominent sign on the upper facade. The building features large glass windows on both floors, allowing natural light to flood the interior and providing clear views of the seating areas. The ground floor includes a covered outdoor seating area with tables and chairs, surrounded by planters and greenery. An external staircase leads to a spacious upper terrace, also furnished with tables and partially shaded by a geometric canopy structure. The exterior combines neutral tones with wood and metal accents, and the landscaping includes manicured bushes and grass patches. The overall design emphasizes openness, comfort, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story cafe with large glass windows, outdoor seating, and a stylish canopy, featuring wood and metal accents and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, 'COFFEE LOUNGE' signage, ground-level outdoor seating, and upper terrace with canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase, upper terrace seating, and landscaped greenery along the building's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the staircase, upper terrace, and a large windowed facade with wood paneling details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows, landscaping, and the edge of the canopy structure.
